title: Spot Access Policy
description: A Spot access policy defines a set of permissions that control what actions users and groups can perform on Spot platform services and resources.

id.description: The unique identifier of the access policy.

name.description: The name of the access policy.

description.description: A description of the access policy.

serviceId.description: The Spot service identifier the permission applies to.

actions.description: The list of permitted actions on the service.

permissions.description: The list of permissions granted by this policy.
